name: Single expatriate - High income (30% flat-rate)
description: Single expatriate earning €100,000 with 30% income tax exemption (Article 155B)

sources.description: Verified using official French tax formula with 30% impatrié exemption (Article 155B). Social contributions on full gross (€100k). Taxable income: €53,319 (after 30% exemption, CSG, prof exp). Tax on quotient: €9,099.69.
